character_buff.name: Awaken Arm
character_buff.description: Momentarily strike a lightning bolt from the sky, absorbing it into ones own power.

effects: Duration : 5 Minutes
Lightning Penetration +15
Monster ATK +100%
INT +15
Increases damage by (2% of extra [INT]), in PvE only
Apply [Enchanted Arm] ([Awaken Arm] level +2), in PvE only

skills.description: Move instantly using the force of Lightning. An afterimage remains behind due to the speed. However, you cannot pass through terrain or obstacles.

[Red Lightning] level +1 with a successful hit

Can be used maximum 3 times
Recharges after using 1 time
